name: json_batch_analyzer
description: Reusable 3-step JSON structure analysis workflow. Step 1: glob all *.json files under a given directory. Step 2: for each file, report top-level key count, each key's type (str/int/float/bool/null/object/array), nested object sub-keys, array length and element-type distribution, and schema hint for array-of-objects. Step 3: cross-file comparison — shared schema keys, per-file unique fields, and type-consistency anomaly flags. Inputs: directory (str, default '.'), pattern (str, default '**/*.json'), exclude (list[str], default ['__pycache__']). Output: formatted multi-file report string.
